creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Raphael Kubo da Costa <rakuco@FreeBSD.org> writes:

> An update on this: it looks like security@kde.org had not been
> contacted at any point, so I finally did that. After some mail
> exchanges, Oswald Buddenhagen (current kcheckpass maintainer) and the
> security folks dispute the claim that this is a kcheckpass
> vulnerability (at most it is an affected application).
>
> Jeff Mitchell from the security team is currently disputing the assigned CVE [1].
>
> [1] http://article.gmane.org/gmane.comp.security.oss.general/6415
